name: Bar Harbor Holiday Inn
description: Come play pickleball at Bar Harbor Holiday Inn in Bar Harbor, ME! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are private.

name: Ellsworth Tennis Center
description: Ellsworth Tennis Center is a place to play pickleball in Ellsworth, ME. There are 4 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to lights.

name: Island Community Center
description: Island Community Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Stonington, ME. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. The courts cannot be reserved. Amenities include restrooms.

name: Mount Desert Island YMCA
description: Mount Desert Island YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Bar Harbor, ME. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights. The courts can be reserved. A membership is required to play.

description: Come play pickleball at Orland Community Center in Orland, ME! There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to food. A membership is required to play.

name: Robbinston School
description: Robbinston School is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Bucksport, ME. There is 1 outdoor court. You’ll need to create your own lines and bring your own net.

description: Come play pickleball at Swans Island Pickleball in Swans Island, ME! There is 1 outdoor hard court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A membership is required to play.

description: The Causeway Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Southwest Harbor, ME. There are 3 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. description: Town of Bar Harbor Athletic Field is a place to play pickleball in Bar Harbor, ME. There are 3 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Reservations are not available. The courts are free.
